name: button-rounded
visual_summary: A rounded button component that can be used at any point in an application where a click action is required. It can be styled as a primary or secondary button, and can also be used as a call-to-action in the UI. The rounded shape makes it visually appealing and easy to tap.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-rounded
Description: A rounded button component that can be used at any point in an application where a click action is required. It can be styled as a primary or secondary button, and can also be used as a call-to-action in the UI. The rounded shape makes it visually appealing and easy to tap.
Style: rounded, primary, secondary
Interactions: clickable, tappable
Tags: UI component, Button, Rounded, Click action

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
